overall.description: A cinematic drive along a futuristic elevated highway in Cyberpunk 2077 during golden hour. The camera passes industrial structures and power lines while overtaking vehicles, showcasing the game's ray-traced lighting and detailed urban infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with industrial structures

events.description: yellow industrial building with NO ENTRY signage passes out of view to the left rear
red van overtakes the ego vehicle on the left lane

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed along the elevated highway, overtaking slower traffic and passing the yellow industrial structure

notable_agents.action: red van overtaking the ego vehicle on the left side

entered.detail: tall yellow industrial structure with exposed beams and red NO ENTRY signage
tall black skyscraper with illuminated vertical signage visible in the distance
multiple high-tension electrical cables on metal pylons running parallel to the highway
metal safety barrier with concrete base along the right edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a drive along an elevated highway during golden hour, dominated by a massive yellow industrial building on the left. The Konpeki Plaza skyscraper is visible in the distance as the vehicle travels at high speed, overtaking a red van that passes on the left. Power transmission lines run parallel on the right side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with transmission towers and overhead signage

events.description: transition from industrial zone to open highway with clear view of power transmission infrastructure
sudden camera jolt suggesting vehicle impact with road debris or rough surface

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved highway with transmission towers lining the right side, approaching overhead signage

entered.detail: modern street lamps with horizontal LED light bars mounted on tall metal poles
large highway sign structure spanning across the road ahead

segments.scene_description: With the industrial building now behind, the highway opens into a sweeping curve lined with prominent power transmission towers on the right. Modern highway lighting poles become visible in the foreground as the vehicle approaches an overhead signage gantry. The Konpeki Plaza remains a constant landmark on the left while the camera experiences a sudden jolt near the end of the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed drive along an elevated highway that transitions from a dense industrial corridor into a sweeping open curve under the glow of golden hour. It begins by passing a massive yellow industrial building on the left, with the distant Konpeki Plaza skyscraper anchoring the horizon as the camera overtakes a red van. As the industrial structure recedes, the road opens up and the camera glides past a series of power transmission lines and modern lighting poles. The scene then shifts into a wide curve, moving beneath an overhead signage gantry while the skyscraper remains a constant landmark to the left. The movement finally culminates in a sudden jolt as the vehicle continues its trajectory through the urban infrastructure.
